name: Cleric: Life Domain Disciple of Life — Cure Wounds bonus healing (L3)
description: Tests that a Level 3 Life Domain Cleric's Disciple of Life feature adds 2 + slot level bonus HP to healing spells. Casting Cure Wounds (L1 slot) with a queued die of 4: expected = 4 (die) + 3 (WIS mod) + 3 (Disciple of Life: 2+1) = 10 total healing. Fighter starts at 8 HP and must reach exactly 18 HP after the cast. If the assertion passes, the healing handler correctly applies the Disciple of Life bonus via classHasFeature('cleric', DISCIPLE_OF_LIFE, 3, 'life-domain').

characters.comment: Life Domain Cleric L3: WIS 16 (+3), subclass life-domain triggers Disciple of Life. spellSaveDC 13, spellAttackBonus +5. IMPORTANT: className+subclass+level live inside the sheet so the healing handler can read them via casterSheetRec.
characters.name: Sister Mira

characters.comment: Fighter ally: starts at 8/24 HP (wounded). Positioned adjacent to Sister Mira for Cure Wounds touch. Needs 10+ healing to reach HP 18 (proving Disciple of Life bonus).
characters.name: Sir Garrett

monsters.comment: Cave Goblin: present to make combat valid. AI endTurn so it does not attack and dirty the Fighter's HP between rounds.
monsters.name: Cave Goblin

actions.comment: === Initiate combat — Sister Mira goes first ===

input.text: I channel divine power to heal my ally!

actions.comment: High initiative ensures Sister Mira acts first.
Checkpoint before heal: Sir Garrett starts at 8 HP.

Queue both 2d8 Cure Wounds dice as [2, 2]. 5e 2024: Cure Wounds is 2d8+WIS at L1. Dice total = 4. With DoL: 4 + 3 (WIS) + 3 (DoL: 2+slot1) = 10 healing. Without DoL: 4 + 3 = 7. Max Fighter HP is 24, so no capping either way.
Cast Cure Wounds (L1) on Sir Garrett. Touch range — Mira(5,10) adjacent to Garrett(10,10). Healing resolved server-side from queued die. Expected: actionComplete: true.

input.text: cast Cure Wounds on Sir Garrett

actions.comment: Sir Garrett healed 10 HP (2+2 dice + 3 WIS mod + 3 Disciple of Life). HP: 8 → 18. If DoL is NOT applied, heal = 4+3=7 and HP = 15 — fails min 17 check. Range min 17, max 19 is a tight band only reachable with Disciple of Life bonus.
